pi_items.source: Checked OpenToonz sample GitHub repository downloaded in setup_opentoonz.sh and found dwanko_run.tnz at the expected relative path.
Task description and export_result.sh confirm this is the directory where outputs are collected.
Task description explicitly requires the agent to add a text level with the content 'EPISODE 1'.
Task asks to render 10 frames. The verifier allows a minimum of 8 files.
Task asks to render 10 frames. The verifier allows a maximum of 12 files.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real OpenToonz sample animation named 'dwanko_run.tnz', which is downloaded from the official OpenToonz samples GitHub repository and located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The user is expected to add the text 'EPISODE 1' to the animation and render 10 frames to the output directory '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/title_card/', with the verifier accepting an output of 8 to 12 files.
